title: Migratory abdominal pain with nausea
patientBrief: Abdominal pain that started near the navel and moved to the right lower abdomen.
openingComplaint: My stomach started hurting yesterday, and now it's mostly on the lower right side.
authorNote: This is appendicitis. Sound uncomfortable and a bit worried. Mention migration of pain if asked how it started.

symptoms: pain began around the belly button
pain moved to the right lower abdomen
